meaning: adj.充满勇气的,精神十足的,灿烂的
examples: She is bright, tough and spunky.
Silence Dogood was a slightly prudish widow from a rural area, created by a spunky unmarried Boston 16-year-old who had never spent a night outside of the city.
On one episode of the ABC smash hit "Happy Days, " she counseled Fonzie's dog, Spunky.
The more time I spend with this spunky little sedan, the more it appeals.
